posts.author: davidac1982
posts.title:
They banned paternity testing in France. Until a man gets consent from his wife, he can't.

If he does a private DNA test without consent, there is a €15,000 fine and/or up to 1 year in prison.

The French government says they're doing it for the preservation of families.

A federal judge in Texas just issued a landmark TRO separating biological males from actual women at FMC Carswell — the FIRST such victory! Female inmates will no longer be forced to shower, sleep, or share cells with convicted male murderers and sex offenders.

But instead of celebrating, the DOJ (under Pam Bondi’s Department) is fighting tooth and nail to keep the madness going — on procedural technicalities while women are being humiliated, assaulted, and impregnated.

Meanwhile, heroic attorney Barry Arrington is battling the same insanity in Colorado (Sirio v. Polis), where a female inmate is locked in with a man who brutally murdered a woman.

Public Advocate just sent a powerful letter to Attorney General Pam Bondi demanding she STOP this resistance and ENFORCE Trump’s order NOW.

Women in prison are not guinea pigs for radical gender ideology. They deserve SAFETY and DIGNITY.
